Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Dead Mother]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 20''' — The Dead Mother's influence grew to the point that the Emperor was killed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 23''' — The thoughts associated with the Heart have a signature similar to the Dead Mother.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 23''' — The Dead Mother is a power that can remake bodies.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 23''' — The Heart of Nakothi was pried out of the Dead Mother's body.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 25''' — The Dead Mother has spawn.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 28''' — The island over the Dead Mother’s corpse is shaking.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 4''' — The Dead Mother once had many hearts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 5''' — The prisoner swore by Dead Mother.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 10''' — The Dead Mother is a gargantuan entity whose body forms Nakothi's island.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 11''' — Shera's blade reminds her of the Dead Mother.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 11''' — Shera wants to clear the Dead Mother out of her life.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 13''' — The Dead Mother is a power that draws people toward it.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 15''' — The Dead Mother could be woken by the release of the Heart's power.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 16''' — The Dead Mother had cults that were exterminated by the Luminians.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 17''' — The Dead Mother's voice is associated with the Heart.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 17''' — The Dead Mother's voice whispers eternally and tries to convince humans to die so she can remake them into a monstrosity.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 19''' — The Dead Mother destroys bodies and builds them anew.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 20''' — The Dead Mother once had eleven other hearts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 24''' — The Dead Mother is currently sleeping.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 25''' — The Dead Mother screamed from out on the Aion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 27''' — Someone believes they are being corrupted by the Dead Mother.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 22''' — The Dead Mother possesses power that Kelarac could use.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 2''' — Syphren has stabbed the Dead Mother's heart.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 3''' — The Dead Mother is a potential threat that the Emperor has a contingency plan for.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 7''' — The influence of the Dead Mother is mentioned.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 9''' — The Dead Mother is a figure whose victory would occur if the human's soul died.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 9''' — The Dead Mother is a being capable of creating servants.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 9''' — The Dead Mother is Nakothi.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 12''' — The Dead Mother is a potential entity that could take over the Emperor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 14''' — The Dead Mother's power can bring the Emperor back to life if Nakothi's Heart is not separated from him.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 20''' — The Emperor risks handing over his body to the Dead Mother.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 21''' — The Dead Mother is something a person can smell like.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 24''' — The Dead Mother is an entity that could potentially stitch someone back together.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 25''' — The Dead Mother is a giant corpse walking.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 26''' — The Dead Mother's proximity makes her Children more powerful.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 26''' — The Dead Mother is a being Shera focuses on.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
